name: multi-cli-agents
description: Codex delegates an existing approved plan to role-specialized local CLI agents across Claude, Codex, Grok, and Antigravity.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex plans to specialized local CLI agents
interface.longDescription: Codex keeps planning and review responsibility, then passes an approved plan to a role-specialized local CLI Runner with capability-aware model and permission settings.
defaultPrompt: 先制定计划，然后启用后端工程师智能体执行。
启用架构师智能体评审当前系统设计。
先规划，再启用 UI 设计师智能体实现页面。
